definition.featurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="feature_container" deletable="false" x="149" y="76"><value name="feature"><block type="feature_tree_simple"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="type">oak</field><field name="base_height">4</field><field name="height_variation_a">2</field><field name="height_variation_b">0</field><field name="force_dirt">FALSE</field><field name="ignore_vines">TRUE</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This block represents an oak tree, and should generate during the VEGETAL_DECORATION stage.</comment><value name="dirt"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:FragrentLog</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block that will be placed under the trunk</comment></block></value><value name="trunk"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:FragrentLog</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block used for the trunk</comment></block></value><value name="foliage"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:FragrentLeaves</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block used for the leaves</comment></block></value><value name="root_placer"><block type="root_placer_none"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Oak trees don't have roots</comment></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_rarity"><field name="rarity">2</field><next><block type="placement_height_uniform"><value name="min"><block type="vertical_anchor_absolute"><field name="value">10</field></block></value><value name="max"><block type="vertical_anchor_absolute"><field name="value">80</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_count"><comment pinned="false" h="105" w="222">Placement modifiers are processed from top to bottom. We try to place 4 trees in each chunk</comment><value name="count"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">1</field><field name="max">2</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_in_square"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="189">We then move each tree horizontally, so that they don't generate in the corner of the chunk</comment><next><block type="placement_surface_water_depth"><field name="depth">0</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is how deep the water can be for the tree to generate. If the value is 0, the tree will never be submerged</comment><next><block type="placement_block_predicate_filter"><value name="condition"><block type="block_predicate_is_air"></block></value><next><block type="placement_block_predicate_filter"><value name="condition"><block type="block_predicate_matching_blocks"><field name="x">0</field><field name="y">-1</field><field name="z">0</field><value name="blockSet"><block type="block_holderset_list"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="2"></mutation><field name="block0">CUSTOM:MossyStrangeStone</field><field name="block1">CUSTOM:StrangeStone</field></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_block_predicate_filter"><value name="condition"><block type="block_predicate_matching_blocks"><field name="x">0</field><field name="y">6</field><field name="z">0</field><value name="blockSet"><block type="block_holderset_list"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="3"></mutation><field name="block0">Blocks.AIR</field><field name="block1">Blocks.VOID_AIR</field><field name="block2">Blocks.CAVE_AIR</field></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_biome_filter"><comment pinned="false" h="85" w="210">We check that the tree doesn't generate in the wrong biome</comment></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
